cards.back: A large and diverse set of data that exceeds the capacity of traditional data management systems
A structured approach to analyze and process data, typically consisting of data ingestion, processing, storage, and visualization
A branch of statistics that deals with summarizing and describing the basic features of a dataset, such as mean, median, and mode
A statistical method that analyzes a single variable or feature of a dataset, often involving visualization and summarization of the data
The process of representing data in a graphical format to better understand and communicate insights
